user.title: Connect to Suno
user.description:
**Step 1:** Open [{suno_url}]({suno_url}) and make sure you are logged in.

**Step 2:** Open Developer Tools (**F12** on Windows/Linux, **Cmd+Option+I** on Mac).

**Step 3:** Go to **Application** tab > **Cookies** > **suno.com** in the sidebar.  Find the row named `__client` and copy its value (starts with `eyJ`).

data_description.cookie: The __client cookie value from suno.com.  Starts with eyJ.  Valid for approximately 2 years.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Suno
reauth_confirm.description: Your Suno session has expired.  Open [{suno_url}]({suno_url}), then repeat the steps above to get a fresh token.

data_description.cookie: The __client cookie value from suno.com.  Starts with eyJ.

data_description.audio_quality: Standard streams MP3.  High quality transcodes to lossless FLAC (larger files, first play triggers server-side conversion).
data_description.cache_enabled: Cache audio files locally for faster playback.
data_description.cache_max_size_mb: Maximum disk space for cached audio files in megabytes.

error.invalid_cookie: Could not authenticate.  Check your cookie is correct and not expired.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Suno.  Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This Suno account is already configured.

data_description.audio_quality: Standard streams MP3.  High transcodes to lossless FLAC (larger files, first play triggers server-side conversion).
data_description.cache_enabled: Cache audio files locally for faster repeat playback.
data_description.cache_max_size_mb: Maximum disk space for cached audio files in megabytes.

sync.title: Sync settings
sync.description: Download FLAC files to a local directory for offline playback, Jellyfin, or backup.

data.sync_recent_days: Keep songs from last N days

data_description.sync_path: Full path where FLAC files will be saved.  Can be any mounted path (NAS, OneDrive, etc.).
data_description.sync_all_playlists: When disabled, you can choose specific playlists on the next page.
data_description.sync_recent_count: Leave empty to disable.  A song is kept if it matches either recent rule.
data_description.sync_recent_days: Leave empty to disable.  A song is kept if it matches either recent rule.
data_description.sync_trash_days: Leave empty to delete files immediately when removed from Suno.

error.invalid_sync_path: Path is not writable.  Check the directory exists and Home Assistant has write permission.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed.  Check your Suno cookie is valid and not expired.
